mapper.select: SELECT portfolio_id AS portfolioId, user_id AS userId, title, template_code AS templateCode, slug, status, output_path AS outputPath, thumbnail_path AS thumbnailPath, portrait_path AS portraitPath, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM portfolio_new WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId}
SELECT s.skill_name FROM user_skill us JOIN skill s ON s.skill_id = us.skill_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.skill_name ASC
SELECT skill_id FROM user_skill WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY skill_id

SELECT portfolio_id AS portfolioId, user_id AS userId, title, template_code AS templateCode, slug, status, output_path AS outputPath, thumbnail_path AS thumbnailPath, portrait_path AS portraitPath, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM portfolio_new WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT portfolio_id AS portfolioId, user_id AS userId, title, template_code AS templateCode, slug, status, output_path AS outputPath, thumbnail_path AS thumbnailPath, portrait_path AS portraitPath, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM portfolio_new WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND template_code = #{templateCode} ORDER BY updated_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT portfolio_id FROM portfolio_new WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND template_code = #{templateCode} ORDER BY updated_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio_new ( portfolio_id, user_id, title, template_code, slug, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( seq_portfolio_new.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{title}, #{templateCode}, #{slug}, #{status}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_new SET output_path = #{outputPath}, thumbnail_path = #{thumbnailPath}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio_snapshot ( snapshot_id, portfolio_id, snapshot_json, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_portfolio_snapshot.NEXTVAL, #{portfolioId}, #{snapshotJson, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO portfolio_snapshot ( snapshot_id, portfolio_id, snapshot_json, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_portfolio_snapshot.NEXTVAL, #{portfolioId}, #{snapshotJson, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT snapshot_id AS snapshotId, portfolio_id AS portfolioId, snapshot_json AS snapshotJson, created_at AS createdAt FROM portfolio_snapshot WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT ps.snapshot_id AS snapshotId, ps.portfolio_id AS portfolioId, ps.snapshot_json AS snapshotJson, ps.created_at AS createdAt FROM portfolio_snapshot ps JOIN portfolio_new pn ON ps.portfolio_id = pn.portfolio_id WHERE pn.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ps.created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT snapshot_id AS snapshotId, portfolio_id AS portfolioId, snapshot_json AS snapshotJson, created_at AS createdAt FROM portfolio_snapshot WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio_snapshot WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId}
SELECT s.skill_name AS skillName, us.user_level AS userLevel FROM user_skill us JOIN skill s ON s.skill_id = us.skill_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY us.user_level DESC, s.skill_name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_snapshot SET snapshot_json = #{snapshotJson}, created_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE snapshot_id = ( SELECT snapshot_id FROM ( SELECT ps.snapshot_id FROM portfolio_snapshot ps JOIN portfolio_new pn ON pn.portfolio_id = ps.portfolio_id WHERE ps.portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND pn.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ps.created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 )
